class.name: Location
class.brief_description: Reusable transform helper backed by OpenCASCADE.
class.description: [Location] wraps an OCCT [code]gp_Trsf[/code] and exposes common CAD placement operations such as translation, rotation, scaling, composition, inversion, and point/vector transformation.

method.name: set_identity
method.description: Resets the location to the identity transform.

method.name: set_translation
method.description: Sets the location to a pure translation by [param offset].

method.name: set_rotation
method.description: Sets the location to a rotation around [param axis].

method.name: set_scale
method.description: Sets the location to a uniform scale around [param center].

method.name: multiplied
method.description: Returns the composition of this location with [param other].

method.name: transform_point
method.description: Transforms a point by the location.

method.name: transform_vector
method.description: Transforms a vector by the location.
